title: crotalaria boehmii
intro: Crotalaria boehmii, also known as the 'Boehm's rattlebox', is a flowering plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Crotalaria boehmii include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially alleviating symptoms of certain infections. Crotalaria boehmii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential as a medicinal plant.
